# Charter — Link Shortener

## Problem

Users need a way to turn long URLs into short, shareable links and see how
often each link is opened.

## Objectives

Deliver a minimal, reliable URL shortener with basic click analytics.

## Goals and non-goals

In scope: creating short links, redirecting, counting clicks. Out of scope:
user accounts, custom domains, and paid tiers.

## Success metrics

These are the headline measures the charter commits to.

| ID | Metric | Target |
|---|---|---|
| KPI-001 | Median redirect latency | < 50 ms |
| KPI-002 | Weekly active shortened links | >= 100 |
